title: Plutarch, Moralia: Greek and Roman Parallel Stories
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Greek and Roman Parallel Stories.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Greek and Roman Parallel Stories.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'Greek and Roman Parallel Stories': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
